description_long: This is a modern, open-shelved storage unit with a stepped design on one side, creating a visually dynamic profile. The structure consists of three main vertical sections, each divided into multiple rectangular cubbyholes, ideal for organizing or displaying items. The stepped section on the left provides varying shelf heights, suitable for storing objects of different sizes or for decorative arrangements. The frame and shelves appear to be constructed from a light-colored wood or wood-like material, giving it a clean and contemporary look. The open-back design allows for visibility and access from both sides, making it versatile for use as a room divider or against a wall. Its robust build suggests it can support a moderate amount of weight, making it suitable for books, decor, or urban utility storage.
description: A modern, stepped open-shelf unit with multiple cubbyholes and a light wood finish, ideal for storage or display in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three vertical sections, with the leftmost section stepped down and all cubbyholes clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth and stepped profile of the shelves, with the vertical thickness of the frame visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the open cubbyholes and stepped design on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the stepped profile and the thickness of the structure.
